_meta.description: Single lookup table: component → variant properties + allowed values + defaults. Generated from knowledge/components/registry/*.json. Do NOT edit manually — re-run generate-property-reference.js.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: See SAP kit 'AI Button' component for native dimensions
See SAP kit 'AI Input' component for native dimensions
See SAP kit 'AI Menu Button' component for native dimensions
See SAP kit 'AI Prompt Input' component for native dimensions
See SAP kit 'AI Rich Text Editor' component for native dimensions
See SAP kit 'AI Split Menu Button' component for native dimensions
See SAP kit 'AI Text Area' component for native dimensions
See SAP kit 'Add Dimensions' component for native dimensions
See SAP kit 'Add People To Calendar' component for native dimensions
Semantic layout element — no native Figma dimensions
knownIssues: sap.m.App — root application container. SAP kit has no Figma component; plugin treats as pass-through.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: See SAP kit 'Banner' component for native dimensions
Full-width horizontal band. Height depends on Design: Header ~44px, SubHeader ~44px, Footer ~48px.
knownIssues: SAP kit exposes this as 'Header' component_set. Plugin's SAP_KEYS maps Bar → the Header key. The Design variant selects Header/SubHeader/Footer visuals.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Semantic layout element — no native Figma dimensions
knownIssues: Plural form; alias to Breadcrumb registry entry.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Small=16, Medium=32, Large=64 px.
Width auto-grows with text; height 26px (Compact) / 36px (Cozy)
Single-month (Selection=Day, Mixed Calendar=False): 272×272. Mixed Calendar=True: 296×338. Two-Month variant is a separate component (Two-Month Calendar).
knownIssues: SAP Calendar component_set has 16 variants. Default variant is 'Form Factor=Compact, Selection=Day, Mixed Calendar=False' (272×272 single month). If a spec needs the two-month layout, use 'Two-Month Calendar' component instead.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: 16×16px box + label text. Touch area extends to label.
Width auto or fixed per Column.width.
Height 48px Compact / 64px Cozy by default. Custom rows up to 114px.
Same as Select. Min 120px useful width; grows to fill parent by default.
knownIssues: SAP Web UI Kit explicitly directs 'If you want to use the Combobox please use the Select component.' The plugin aliases ComboBox → Select. Same visual rendering.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: 256px default.
300px default; wider than DatePicker.
256px default.
Auto width 320–80% viewport. Height hugs content.
See SAP kit 'Drop-Down' component for native dimensions
Full viewport height; resizes with viewport.
knownIssues: Page-layout wrapper — plugin uses SKIP_SELF to recurse into slots.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Width fills DynamicPage. Height varies by content; collapses on scroll.
knownIssues: SAP DynamicPageHeader instance has empty swap slots — plugin uses native PageHeader frame.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Full width of DynamicPage.
knownIssues: Plugin uses native DynamicPageTitle frame builder.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Horizontal split. Main: layoutGrow=1 (fills). Side: fixed width ~320px unless equalSplit=true.
knownIssues: SAP Web UI Kit has no dedicated DynamicSideContent component — this is a composed native layout: HORIZONTAL auto-layout frame with a Main column (grow) + Side column (fixed width). Renderer supports slots.mainContent and slots.sideContent.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: See SAP kit 'Empty Planning Calendar' component for native dimensions
Width fills container.
Full width of parent.
knownIssues: Plugin renders as native FilterBar frame with filter children placed inline.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Semantic layout element — no native Figma dimensions
knownIssues: sap.m.FlexBox — responsive flex container. Handled by plugin's LAYOUT_CONTAINERS set (flat-walked).

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Semantic layout element — no native Figma dimensions
knownIssues: sap.f.FlexibleColumnLayout — master/detail/subdetail responsive split. Handled natively by plugin.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: See SAP kit 'Footer' component for native dimensions
Width fills parent. Field column widths defined by FormLayout.
knownIssues: Plugin treats Form as OPAQUE_SAP — places instance without recursing.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Auto width to hug content. Height ~24px compact, ~32px cozy.
knownIssues: SAP Web UI Kit doesn't ship a dedicated 'Generic Tag' component — the visual pattern is a variant of the Tag component. Plugin aliases GenericTag → Tag.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: See SAP kit 'Grouping Columns' component for native dimensions
Semantic layout element — no native Figma dimensions
knownIssues: sap.m.HBox — horizontal layout primitive. Handled by plugin's LAYOUT_CONTAINERS set (flat-walked).

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: See SAP kit 'Homepage Hero Banner' component for native dimensions
32×32px Compact / 44×44px Cozy. Square aspect.
See SAP kit 'Icon Menu Button' component for native dimensions
See SAP kit 'Icon Split Button' component for native dimensions
Tab text in SAP library kit cannot be overridden via direct text node injection. Must use IconTabFilter child instances with `text` property via setProperties.
knownIssues: Plugin currently falls back to native frame when tab text injection fails — loses SAP token bindings

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Auto width by label.
knownIssues: Figma library variant may use "Tab Text" or "text" — try both.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Native Figma frame with image fill. Width/height explicit in spec.
knownIssues: SAP Web UI Kit has no dedicated Image component — plugin renders as a native Figma frame with a rounded-rectangle placeholder fill (sapContent_Placeholderloading token) plus a stroke. Spec.props.src is documented but not fetched at build time; use Figma's Insert Image after build if a real image is needed.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Auto width, height ~20px Loose / ~16px Narrow. 10 color schemes available.
knownIssues: SAP Web UI Kit doesn't ship InfoLabel as its own component — plugin aliases InfoLabel → Tag. Color-scheme prop maps to Tag color variants where possible.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Default 256px wide; resize via instance.resize() supported.
See SAP kit 'Input Message Popover' component for native dimensions
Semantic layout element — no native Figma dimensions
knownIssues: sap.ui.core.Item — sub-item primitive; composed by parents (Select, ComboBox, etc.). No direct render.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Auto height; fits parent width when inside Form.
See SAP kit 'Legend' component for native dimensions
Auto width.
Full width. Item height varies by type (48px–96px).
knownIssues: SAP List instance shows "List Header / Group Header / List Item" demo. Use flat StandardListItem for custom data.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: See SAP kit 'List Item' component for native dimensions
Semantic layout element — no native Figma dimensions
knownIssues: Legacy naming; alias to MaskedInput registry entry.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Auto-sized to widest MenuListItem. Positioned by opener (MenuButton).
Auto width; height 26px Compact / 36px Cozy.
Full width of parent Menu. Height ~32px Compact / ~44px Cozy.
Semantic layout element — no native Figma dimensions
knownIssues: sap.m.MessagePopoverItem — composed by MessagePopover parent. No direct render.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Full width of parent.
256px default, resizable.
256px default, grows with tokens.
Height 32px. Full width of parent SideNavigation.
See SAP kit 'No Notifications' component for native dimensions
See SAP kit 'Notification Banner' component for native dimensions
See SAP kit 'Notification List Item' component for native dimensions
See SAP kit 'Notifications' component for native dimensions
Full-width banner. Title + intro + number + numberUnit stacked vertically.
knownIssues: ObjectHeader is a legacy sap.m component superseded by ObjectPageHeader in Fiori 2+. Plugin aliases ObjectHeader → ObjectPageHeader (same visual container, richer variant support).

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Fits row height.
Auto width.
Full viewport.
knownIssues: Plugin uses SKIP_SELF — recurses into sections.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Auto width.
Full width of parent container by default. Height auto-fits to tallest child.
knownIssues: Plugin renders OverflowToolbar as a horizontal AutoLayout frame (gap=8, padding=8/16) with children placed in declared order. ToolbarSpacer becomes a layoutGrow=1 spacer. Overflow-into-More-menu behavior is not visual-only in Figma — show the inline actions and represent overflow as an IconButton with the 'overflow' icon at the right edge.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Semantic layout element — no native Figma dimensions
knownIssues: sap.m.Page — page wrapper with header/footer. Rendered by plugin's page-layout logic.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Width fills parent. Height hugs content.
knownIssues: SAP Panel content slot cannot be filled via Plugin API — plugin places Panel as opaque or replaces with content.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: See SAP kit 'Product Switch' component for native dimensions
16×16px circle + label.
Full width of container.
5 stars at 16px = ~112px native. Editable adds ~16px hover halo. Do not force width < 96px.
See SAP kit 'Scrollbar' component for native dimensions
Semantic layout element — no native Figma dimensions
knownIssues: sap.m.SegmentedButtonItem — composed by SegmentedButton parent. No direct render.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Default 256px wide; resize via instance.resize().
Always full viewport width. Height fixed at 52px. Use FILL horizontal sizing after appendChild.
knownIssues: secondaryTitle property may not be exposed in current Figma kit — verify per library version

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: See SAP kit 'Shell Search' component for native dimensions
Width 224–256px Expanded, 48px Collapsed. Height fills parent column.
knownIssues: layoutSizingHorizontal=FILL must be set AFTER appendChild to sidebar column

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: Full width of container.
Width hugs text + arrow. Height ~26px Compact / ~36px Cozy.
Height 48px Compact / 64px Cozy.
120px default.
52×24px Compact / 60×32px Cozy.
Full width of content area. Header 32px, row 48px Compact / 64px Cozy.
knownIssues: SAP Table instance shows "Sales Orders (15)" demo content that cannot be overridden. Use Ref79TableRow native renderer for custom data.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: See SAP kit 'Table Cell' component for native dimensions
Auto width by text.
Width fills container; height by rows.
160px default.
See SAP kit 'Toolbar Items' component for native dimensions
Not a real Figma component. Plugin sets layoutGrow=1 on the PREVIOUS sibling so it stretches, pushing subsequent siblings to the trailing edge.
knownIssues: ToolbarSpacer is a plugin-side layout marker, not a SAP library component. It has no renderable Figma node — the effect is achieved by setting layoutGrow=1 on the previous sibling in the toolbar. See plugin code.js line ~2200.

pluginNotes.sizingConstraints: See SAP kit 'Two-Month Calendar' component for native dimensions
See SAP kit 'Unable to Load Image' component for native dimensions
See SAP kit 'User Menu' component for native dimensions
Semantic layout element — no native Figma dimensions
knownIssues: sap.m.VBox — vertical layout primitive. Handled by plugin's LAYOUT_CONTAINERS set (flat-walked).
